## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Requirement Mapping

- [ ] User story and AC impacted are listed
- [ ] ADR/TSDR impact reviewed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (unit/integration/e2e as appropriate)
- [ ] Logging considered for new behavior

## Validation

- [ ] `poetry run ruff check .`
- [ ] `poetry run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `poetry run pytest`

## Screenshots / Evidence (if UI changes)

Attach screenshots or terminal outputs if useful.
